seoTitle: Mount Charles vs Mount Compass — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Charles and Mount Compass. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Charles vs Mount Compass: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Charles and Mount Compass.
heading: Mount Charles vs Mount Compass — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Charles, South Australia and Mount Compass, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Charles has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Mount Compass (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Charles or Mount Compass safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Charles has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Mount Compass scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Charles scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Compass scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Charles or Mount Compass?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Charles has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
